query:
ALTER TABLE task_category_assignments 
  DROP FOREIGN KEY fk_2,
  ADD CONSTRAINT fk_task_cat_shopping 
    FOREIGN KEY (categoryId) REFERENCES shopping_categories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;
